parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox

participant "Notebook\nAE" as NotebookAE

box "CSE & Hosted Resources" #F5F5F5
participant "CSE" as CSE
participant "StreetLight-AE-1\nLight-Container-1" as SL1 #F59D2A
participant "StreetLight-AE-2\nLight-Container-2" as SL2 #F59D2A
end box

NotebookAE -> CSE : RETRIEVE <m2m:cb>\nrcn=child-resources\nfilterCriteria: ty=container, lbl=opt
activate CSE

CSE -> SL1 : RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-1/Light-Container-1
activate SL1
SL1 -> CSE : Response
deactivate SL1

CSE -> SL2 : RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-2/Light-Container-2
activate SL2
SL2 -> CSE : Response
deactivate SL2

CSE -> NotebookAE : Response (list of containers retrieved)
deactivate CSE

@enduml
```
